meta.description: Tract-level dataset of Eichler Homes developments. Counts and years are approximate and compiled from public sources; entries marked verified:false need cross-checking against UC Berkeley Environmental Design Archives site plans.

tracts.name: University Gardens
tracts.streets: Stanford Ave, Middlefield Rd

tracts.name: El Centro Gardens
tracts.streets: El Centro Dr, Channing Ave

tracts.name: Green Gables
tracts.streets: Greer Rd, Channing Ave, Ivy Ln (near Edgewood Plaza)
tracts.notes: One of the most architecturally cohesive early tracts.

tracts.name: Charleston Meadows
tracts.streets: Near Charleston Rd, Wilcot Way

tracts.name: Greer Park
tracts.streets: Adjacent to Greer Park, California Ave

tracts.name: Channing Park (1–3)
tracts.streets: Channing Ave corridors
tracts.notes: Model evolution visible across the three phases.

tracts.name: Fairmeadow ("The Circles")
tracts.streets: Concentric circular streets off East Meadow Dr

tracts.name: Greenmeadow (1 & 2)
tracts.streets: Parkside Dr, Ferne Ave, Greenmeadow Way (near Charleston Rd)
tracts.notes: Refined mid-50s designs; community pool and center.

tracts.name: Triple El
tracts.streets: El Cajon Way, El Capitan Ave, near El Camino Real

tracts.name: Edgewood
tracts.streets: Adjacent to Greer Rd
tracts.notes: Bridge-phase designs between early and atrium eras.

tracts.name: Royal Manor
tracts.streets: Near Lawrence Rd, Louis Rd
tracts.notes: Late-1950s refinement; first atrium models appear around this era.

tracts.name: Los Arboles
tracts.streets: Ames Ave, Middlefield Rd, Holly Oak Dr, Cork Oak Way

tracts.name: Los Arboles Addition
tracts.streets: Torreya Ct, Loma Verde Ave

tracts.name: Sunnyvale Manor I
tracts.streets: North Bayview Ave, East Maude Ave
tracts.notes: The very first Eichler tract; pre-radiant-heating prototypes.

tracts.name: Sunnyvale Manor II
tracts.streets: Morse Ave, Maple Ave, East Arbor Ave, East Duane Ave
tracts.notes: AA-1 floor plan; the first architect-designed Eichlers with the glass window-wall.

tracts.name: Fairpark
tracts.streets: Central Sunnyvale

tracts.name: Fairorchard
tracts.streets: Wright Ave, Edmonton Ave, La Salle Dr, Helena Dr, Homestead Rd

tracts.name: Fairbrae
tracts.streets: Sheraton Dr, Pome Ave, Quince Ave, Pulora Ct, Hollenbeck Ave

tracts.name: Fairbrae Addition
tracts.streets: Sesame Dr, Torrington Dr, Templeton Dr, Strawberry Ct, Tangerine Way

tracts.name: Rancho Verde
tracts.streets: South Mary Ave, Ticonderoga Dr, McIntosh Ave, Trenton Dr, Somerset Dr

tracts.name: Fairwood
tracts.streets: South Wolfe Rd, Dartshire Way, Mallard Way, Kingfisher Way, Carlisle Way, Firebird Way

tracts.name: Parmer Place
tracts.streets: Cumberland Dr, Piper Ave, Pear Ave, Brookline Dr

tracts.name: Rancho Sans Souci
tracts.streets: Mackenzie Dr, Laurentian Dr, Olympus Dr, Pendleton Dr
tracts.notes: Known for dramatic double A-frame rooflines.

tracts.name: Primewood
tracts.streets: Alison Way, Lennox Way, Beaverton Ct
tracts.notes: Late-period refined atrium and gallery models.

tracts.name: Morepark (Rose Glen)
tracts.streets: Margot Pl, Adele Pl (near San Jose City College)

tracts.name: Fairglen
tracts.streets: Fairglen Dr, Fairwood Ave, Briarwood Ave, Booksin Ave (Willow Glen)

tracts.name: Fairglen Additions (1–3)
tracts.streets: Andalusia Way, Fairorchard Ave, Fairhill Ln, Fairlawn Ave (Willow Glen)

tracts.name: Fairhaven (Mossbrook)
tracts.streets: Mossbrook Ave, Mossbrook Cir, Student Ln
tracts.notes: Larger ~1,700 sq ft homes with expansive atriums.

tracts.name: Hudson
tracts.streets: Comstock Dr, Hudson Dr, Frobisher Way, Raleigh Dr
tracts.notes: Notable architectural diversity within one tract.

tracts.name: Fairview (Monta Loma)
tracts.streets: Quincy Dr, Benjamin Dr, Thaddeus Dr

tracts.name: Bell Meadows
tracts.streets: Trophy Dr, Eichler Ct
tracts.notes: Late-era enclosed galleries and larger footprints.

tracts.name: Fairgrove
tracts.streets: Around Hyde Ave, Stendhal Ln

tracts.name: San Mateo Highlands
tracts.streets: Pulgas Ridge; terraced hillside layout
tracts.notes: The largest Eichler neighborhood ever built; home of the steel X-100 prototype house.

tracts.name: 19th Avenue Park
tracts.streets: Urban flatland near Hwy 101

tracts.name: Atherwood
tracts.streets: Transitional residential zones

tracts.name: Mills Estates
tracts.streets: Elevated sites in the Burlingame hills

tracts.name: Foster City (Bay Vista / Marina Point / Treasure Isle)
tracts.streets: Puffin Ct, Loon Ct; lagoon-adjacent

tracts.name: Terra Linda North
tracts.streets: Manuel Freitas Pkwy, Las Colindas Rd
tracts.notes: Classic post-and-beam; includes a rare cluster of two-story models.

tracts.name: Terra Linda South
tracts.streets: South of Nova Albion Way; Golden Hinde Blvd
tracts.notes: Courtyard and atrium models with strong streetscape rhythm.

tracts.name: Lower Lucas Valley (Marinwood, "The Berry Patch")
tracts.streets: Berry-themed street names
tracts.notes: Cohesive planning and strong preservation culture.

tracts.name: Upper Lucas Valley
tracts.streets: Idylberry Rd, north of San Rafael
tracts.notes: Double A-frame roofs adapted to steep terrain; active homeowners association with design review.

tracts.name: Strawberry Point
tracts.streets: Richardson Bay waterfront

tracts.name: Sleepy Hollow
tracts.streets: Fawn Dr area

tracts.name: Rancho San Miguel
tracts.streets: San Miguel Dr, El Divisadero

tracts.name: Rancho del Diablo
tracts.streets: Near Concord Community Park

tracts.name: Rancho Los Santos
tracts.streets: Salem St and surroundings
tracts.notes: Includes a small 1965 enclave (~20 homes) plus a larger late-50s phase.

tracts.name: Greenridge
tracts.streets: Highwood Rd, Feather Ct

tracts.name: Sequoyah Hills
tracts.streets: Phaeton Dr (Oakland Hills)

tracts.name: Diamond Heights
tracts.streets: Between Twin Peaks and Glen Park
tracts.notes: Split-level urban Eichlers, 1,629–2,020 sq ft, built on steep hillsides.

tracts.name: South Land Park Hills (Unit 7)
tracts.streets: South Land Park Dr, Fordham Way, Oakridge Way
tracts.notes: Heat-adapted glass design for the Central Valley.

tracts.name: Fairhaven
tracts.streets: Near Fairhaven Ave
tracts.notes: First of the three Orange tracts.

tracts.name: Fairmeadow
tracts.streets: Central Orange

tracts.name: Fairhills
tracts.streets: Orange hills
tracts.notes: Third and final Orange tract. The three Orange tracts total roughly 350 homes.

tracts.name: Balboa Highlands
tracts.streets: Jimeno Ave, Lisette St, Nanette St, Darla Ave
tracts.notes: LA's Eichler tract; a designated Historic Preservation Overlay Zone (HPOZ).

tracts.name: Conejo Village
tracts.streets: Camino Manzanas area
